name: ACE inhibitor/ARB potassium and renal monitoring
risk: Hyperkalemia and renal function deterioration can be missed if K+ and renal function are unknown.
safety_action: Do not reassure that potassium supplementation is safe with ACEI/ARB unless labs and indication are known.
urgency_changers: Marked hyperkalemia, ECG changes, oliguria, hypotension, or rapidly worsening renal function.
pharmacist_traps: Do not treat a normal historical potassium as current reassurance after an acute illness or dose change.
